headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.youtube.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://cdn.sanity.io https://i.ytimg.com; media-src 'self' https://cdn.sanity.io; connect-src 'self' https://*.sanity.io https://api.resend.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://player.vimeo.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
